title: Gaveno Cavailia Super Soft Faux Fur Fleece Plain Throw Blanket, Burgundy, Double, 150 x 200 cm
features: Luxurious Quality to given an exceptional Softness, Smoothness and Long-Lasting Durability. 100% Polyester
Perfect for sofas, chairs, bedroom, cars, camping, picnics, travel & home. It'll will keep you warm. Perfect for snuggling up on the couch.
Washing Instructions: Machine Washable. Synthetic 40 Degree Wash. Use Colour Safe Detergent. Wash Similar Colours together.
Drying Instructions: Do not tumble dry. Do not dry clean. Do not Iron.
Safety: Keep away from fire. Keep dark coloured fabrics away from light coloured furnishings.
